saints_visual_detail: Use only verified picture/icon/painting of the saint. If multiple verified saint images exist, sequence them one after another. Do not use monastery, manuscript, map, landscape, or generic source images in Saints final videos.
thumbnail_detail: For every Saints upload, use The Saints/assets/Thumbnails as the source of truth for thumbnails. If the assigned thumbnail is missing, create a cinematic thumbnail in the same visual style as the existing Saints thumbnails, include the saint/elder picture, save it into The Saints/assets/Thumbnails, then copy it to assets/saints_thumbnail_video_<id>.png for upload. Never use abstract or generic placeholder thumbnail art. For the Nikon story video, use the HE LEFT IT ALL thumbnail; for prayer-to-the-saint Nikon content, use the other philosophy/repentance thumbnail.
replacement_cleanup_detail: For Saints, once a replacement video uploads successfully as private, delete the older private drafts declared by replacement_for_uploaded_video/delete_after_success_ids without asking again. Never delete public videos. Always keep the uploaded replacement and log deletions.
akathists_text_detail: Akathists.com granted permission for The Saints to use akathist texts in YouTube prayer videos. Use full text/audio/on-screen text only with attribution: Akathist text used with permission from Akathists.com.
akathists_permission_source: Email reply from admin@akathists.com to Vlad, shown 2026-06-08/2026-06-09: Yes, by all means, permission granted.
